---
title: "Exercise 5: Regression II"
---

::: {.learning-objectives}
- Estimate and interpret a multiple regression model in Python.
- Refine a regression model, assessing how additional predictors affect model fit.
- Implement and evaluate a logistic regression model for a binary outcome.
:::

::: callout-note
using forward and backward variable selection
logistic regression: interpreting predicted probabilities and classification performance
:::

TODO: explicit learning: when we use regression as a baseline, we will also run it in a train/test mode (unlike in exercises 4 and 5)

## Exam prep

TODO : include specific questions/tasks that could be included in the exam.

::: {.callout-tip title="Session 5 survey"}
Before you wrap up, please complete the Session 5 survey here: [{{< var sessions.session_5.survey_url >}}]({{< var sessions.session_5.survey_url >}}){target="_blank"}. Thank you 🙏
:::
